name: glyphs-mcp
description: Inspect and safely control open Glyphs fonts through the local Glyphs MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Review and control open Glyphs fonts from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the local Glyphs MCP plug-in for read-only font feedback, bounded dry runs, explicit apply confirmation, and focused progress or error cards. Glyphs remains the editor.
defaultPrompt: Show the Glyphs MCP server and open-font status.
Review the selected glyph and explain any warnings.
Preview spacing changes for my selected glyphs.
